# seerr_override_rule (Data Source)

Read a Seerr override rule by ID via `/api/v1/overrideRule`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_override_rule" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

- `created_at` (String)
- `genre` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

- `language` (String)
- `profile_id` (Number)
- `radarr_service_id` (Number)
- `root_folder` (String)
- `sonarr_service_id` (Number)
- `tags` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `users` (String)
